spec.objective: Author unit tests proving the per-level vendor switch: (1) same Project with task-level Vendor:openai and phase-level unset resolves openai vs anthropic respectively; (2) Spec.Subagent.Vendor:openai propagates to un-overridden levels but is shadowed by a level-specific Vendor:anthropic; (3) Helm-default TIDE_DEFAULT_VENDOR env override reaches tideHelmProviderDefaults; (4) all existing TestResolveProvider* assertions still pass unmodified. Update dispatch_helpers_test.go and env_test.go. Gate: make test exits 0 with zero regressions.
